text.title: agile-hybrid-approaches Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agile-hybrid-approaches as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agile-in-name-only: daily standups plus a waterfall plan.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Standups without a working sprint backlog and empirical planning produce the overhead of both methods with the benefit of neither.

failure-mode.description: Recommending agile on a fixed-price contract without a scope-envelope warning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fixed-price plus agile only works with a scope-envelope contract (range of stories, change budget, exit clauses). Without it, every backlog refinement is a contract dispute.

failure-mode.description: Adopting SAFe to fix a single-team velocity problem.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SAFe is a multi-team scaling framework. Applying it to a one-team problem adds PI planning, ARTs, and RTEs without solving the velocity root cause.
